The '''Meltdown''' was a [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] cocktail, said to be a more "sophisticated" version of the [[Reactor Core (drink)|Reactor Core]]. The drink mixed [[Spice Liqueur]] with [[Lum/Legends|Lum]] and had no need to release the narcotic agents that the Reactor Core did. The Meltdown was also more expensive than the Reactor Core, typically costing ten to twelve [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="GG9" />
